title: polygala alpicola
intro: Polygala alpicola, also known as Alpine Milkwort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Polygalaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, attributed to its flavonoid and terpenoid compounds. The health benefits of Polygala alpicola include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes, with the dried roots and leaves being used to create herbal preparations.
